mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interior (c_id, c_kind, c_name, i_tag, i_text) VALUES ( #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{i_tag}, #{i_text})
INSERT INTO i_example (c_id, c_name, c_kind, ie_tag, ie_tag2, ie_content) VALUES ( #{c_id}, #{c_name}, #{c_kind}, #{ie_tag}, #{ie_tag2}, #{ie_content})

INSERT INTO booking (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_kind, b_long, b_date, b_status, b_content, b_answer) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_kind}, #{b_long}, #{b_date}, #{b_status}, #{b_content}, #{b_answer})
INSERT INTO invoice (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createddate, invoice_no, invoice_kind) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_kind})

INSERT ALL
INTO invoice_detail (id, c_id,c_kind,c_name,b_createddate,invoice_no,invoice_kind,invoice_text,invoice_qty,invoice_price) VALUES (#{id}, #{c_id},#{c_kind},#{c_name},#{b_createddate},#{invoice_no},#{invoice_kind},#{item.invoice_text}, #{item.invoice_qty},#{item.invoice_price})
SELECT * FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO invoice_detail (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createddate, invoice_no, invoice_text, invoice_qty, invoice_price) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_text}, #{invoice_qty}, #{invoice_price})

INSERT INTO i_review (id, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_createddate, invoice_no, invoice_kind, ir_content) VALUES ( #{id}, #{c_id}, #{c_kind}, #{c_name}, #{b_createdDate}, #{invoice_no}, #{invoice_kind}, #{ir_content})
mapper.select: SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, c_tel, c_addr, c_info, c_boss FROM company WHERE c_kind LIKE 'interior'
SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, i_tag, i_text FROM interior
SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, i_tag, i_text FROM interior WHERE c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%'
SELECT c_id, c_kind, c_name, ie_content, ie_tag, ie_tag2 FROM i_example WHERE c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%'

SELECT id, b_createddate, c_id, c_kind, c_name, b_kind, b_long, b_date, b_status, b_content, b_answer FROM booking WHERE c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%'

SELECT id, b_createddate, c_id, c_kind, c_name, invoice_no, invoice_kind FROM invoice WHERE id LIKE '%' || #{id} || '%' AND c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%' AND b_createddate = #{b_createdDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

SELECT id, b_createddate, c_id, c_kind, c_name, invoice_no, invoice_kind, invoice_text, invoice_qty, invoice_price FROM invoice_detail WHERE id LIKE '%' || #{id} || '%' AND c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%' AND b_createddate = #{b_createdDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND invoice_no LIKE '%' || #{invoice_no} || '%' AND invoice_kind LIKE '%' || #{invoice_kind} || '%'

SELECT id, b_createddate, c_id, c_kind, c_name, invoice_no, invoice_kind, ir_content, ir_createddate FROM i_review WHERE c_id LIKE '%' || #{c_id} || '%' AND c_kind LIKE '%' || #{c_kind} || '%' AND c_name LIKE '%' || #{c_name} || '%' AND invoice_kind LIKE '%' || #{invoice_kind} || '%'
